rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/29/19: 1. Please file the Declaration of Real Property 2. In a Supplement to Petition, signed and verified by Petitioner, please state whether Robert and Randall were survived by issue. If so, please provide all information required by Item 8 of the Petition. 3. Any issue must receive or waive proper notice. 4. Additional information re Decedent's capacity at time of death and to refute the presumption of destruction with intent to revoke would be helpful.
